2605.02308.title: Structural Dilemmas and Developmental Pathways of Legal Argument Mining in the Era of Artificial Intelligence
2605.02308.paper_summary: Against the backdrop of rapid advances in artificial intelligence, legal argument mining has emerged as an important research area linking legal texts with intelligent analysis, carrying significant theoretical and practical implications. Existing studies have primarily developed along three dimensions: data, technology, and theory. At the data level, raw legal texts and annotated corpora constitute the foundational resources. At the technological level, research paradigms have evolved from rule-based systems and traditional machine learning to large language models (LLMs). At the theoretical level, argumentation theory and legal dogmatics provide important references for modeling argumentation structures. However, despite ongoing progress, the overall development of legal argument mining remains relatively slow. Building on a systematic review of existing research, this study conducts an in-depth analysis and finds that this is due not only to data scarcity or technical limitations, but more fundamentally to the lack of a structured representational approach that reconciles theoretical expressiveness with computational feasibility. Specifically, this challenge manifests in dilemmas in data standardization, obstacles to effective modeling, and limitations in domain adaptation. In response, the study proposes several key directions for future research. It aims to provide a reframing of key problems and a pathway for future development in legal argument mining, while leaving specific models and implementation schemes for further investigation.
2605.02308.paper_summary_zh: 在人工智慧快速進步的背景下，法律論證挖掘已成為一個重要的研究領域，將法律文本與智能分析聯繫起來，具有重要的理論和實踐意涵。現有研究主要沿著三個維度發展：數據、技術和理論。在數據層面，原始法律文本和註釋語料庫構成了基礎資源。在技術層面，研究範式已從基於規則的系統和傳統機器學習演變為大型語言模型（LLMs）。在理論層面，論證理論和法律教義學為建模論證結構提供了重要參考。然而，儘管持續進展，法律論證挖掘的整體發展仍然相對緩慢。基於對現有研究的系統性回顧，本研究進行了深入分析，發現這不僅是由於數據稀缺或技術限制，更根本上是缺乏一種結構化的表現方法，無法調和理論的表達能力與計算的可行性。具體而言，這一挑戰體現在數據標準化的困境、有效建模的障礙以及領域適應的限制。作為回應，本研究提出了幾個未來研究的關鍵方向。它旨在重新框定關鍵問題並為法律論證挖掘的未來發展提供一條途徑，同時將具體模型和實施方案留待進一步研究。
2605.02308.author: Xianglei Liao et.al.
2605.02308.authors: Xianglei Liao, Chuanyi Li, Kun Chen
